title: In-plant applications of a micro-tensiometer water stress sensor
notes: Zhu broke the pipeline: roman-numeral, span-wrapped headings yielded 0 chapters detected (real: 6 body chapters I-VI; VII references and VIII appendix are skip regions), references/appendix were not skipped (DOIs read aloud), HTML and page-anchor markup leaked into narration, and a Penman-Monteith constant (Cp = 1.01e3, present in source) was lost to equation shredding. The treadmill failure, quantified.
